description: Teamo A MVP — Complete remaining features: data persistence, agent lifecycle, settings, search, batch ops

userStories.title: Workspace Onboarding
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to create a workspace so I have a place to manage my agents.

userStories.title: Sidebar navigation structure
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clean sidebar with Dashboard, Workbench, Issues, Goals as top-level items.

userStories.title: Agent creation page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create an agent with engine, role, goal, and working directory.
acceptanceCriteria: Engine picker: Claude Code and Codex only

userStories.title: PTY terminal integration
userStories.description: As a user, I want each agent to have a real terminal running the AI engine.
userStories.notes: Completed in commit e9bd5b5, rewritten in 50e9a40

userStories.title: Terminal session persistence across navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want terminal content preserved when navigating away and back.
acceptanceCriteria: TerminalSessionManager caches TerminalView at app level
Navigation away and back preserves content
Workbench and AgentDetail share same TerminalView

userStories.title: Agent state auto-detection
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see each agent's state automatically detected.
acceptanceCriteria: ANSI cleaning + regex matching for waiting patterns
Decoration lines don't trigger false positives

userStories.title: macOS notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want notifications when agent state changes.

userStories.title: Dashboard overview
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard with key metrics and recent activity.

userStories.title: Workbench multi-terminal view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all agent terminals simultaneously in a configurable grid.
userStories.notes: Completed in commit e61f1bf, tested in 0d5be0e

userStories.title: Goals management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and track goals with status and progress.

userStories.title: Issues management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage issues with priorities and status tracking.

userStories.title: Auto-send initial goal
userStories.description: As a user, I want the agent to automatically receive its initial goal when ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Send goal when state becomes waiting

userStories.title: E2E test infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CLI flags for automated E2E testing.

userStories.title: Data persistence — Workspace and Agents
userStories.description: As a user, I want my workspace and agents to persist across app restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E: create workspace + agent, quit app, relaunch, data preserved
userStories.notes: Completed in commit 2ef9ae4. Verified: 5 data files created, app restarts with data intact.

userStories.title: Data persistence — Goals and Issues
userStories.description: As a user, I want my goals and issues to persist across app restarts.
userStories.notes: Completed together with US-014 in commit 2ef9ae4. Goals and Issues use same persistence pattern.

userStories.title: Agent lifecycle — Restart and Delete
userStories.description: As a user, I want to restart a stopped agent or delete an agent entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: Restart button visible only when agent is stopped
Restart closes old PTY, creates new session, relaunches engine
Context menu on sidebar agent row has Delete option
Delete terminates PTY, cleans session, removes from list
E2E: create agent → stop → restart → verify terminal works
userStories.notes: Completed in commit b7f118e. Restart button in AgentDetailView, Delete via context menu + confirmation dialog in SidebarView.

userStories.title: Settings view
userStories.description: As a user, I want a settings page for app-level configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings entry in sidebar bottom or menu bar
Settings: default engine, default working directory, notification toggle
userStories.notes: SettingsDetailView.swift created with General/Notifications/Workbench/About sections. Uses @AppStorage. Added to sidebar and Xcode project.

userStories.title: Terminal output search
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search within a terminal's output.
acceptanceCriteria: Search icon in Agent Detail expands search bar

userStories.title: Agent batch operations
userStories.description: As a user, I want to start/stop all agents at once from the Workbench.
acceptanceCriteria: Workbench header has Start All / Stop All buttons
Start All launches all stopped agents
Stop All terminates all running agents
Buttons shown/hidden based on current state
userStories.notes: Start All / Stop All buttons added to WorkbenchView header. Conditional visibility based on agent states.

userStories.title: Activity log persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want activity history preserved across app sessions.
userStories.notes: Implemented as part of US-014/015 persistence work. activities.json with 1000 entry cap, loaded on startup.
